final:
module RefModule(
    input wire clk_in,
    input wire reset,
    input wire freq_control,
    output reg clk_out
);
    parameter DIV_RATIO = 4; // Frequency division ratio
    reg [1:0] obf_counter;

    always @(posedge clk_in or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            clk_out <= 0;
            obf_counter <= 0;
        end else if (obf_counter == (DIV_RATIO - 1)) begin
            clk_out <= ~clk_out; // Toggle output clock
            obf_counter <= 0; // Reset obf_counter
        end else begin
            obf_counter <= obf_counter + 1; // Increment obf_counter
        end
    end
endmodule
